overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a group walking through a rain-soaked futuristic metropolis with vibrant neon signage. The camera follows characters along a busy sidewalk, across an intersection, and into a covered pedestrian walkway with massive digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with neon advertising towers

agents.ego_description: following a group of pedestrians including a woman with purple hair and another with an umbrella hat along the wet sidewalk

notable_agents.action: woman with purple hair walking steadily ahead wearing a brown vest and shorts
woman wearing a distinctive umbrella hat and dark bodysuit walking forward

entered.detail: tall buildings with prominent pink and blue neon vertical lighting
large modern structure with massive curved digital screen displaying advertisements
floating holographic display showing product advertisements
overhead structure supporting traffic signals spanning the street
digital speed limit display showing 40 km/h

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-slicked futuristic city sidewalk flanked by towering neon-lit skyscrapers on the left and a massive curved digital building on the right. The camera follows a small group of pedestrians walking forward, including a woman with purple hair and another wearing an umbrella hat. Holographic advertising kiosks and parked futuristic cars line the street as the group approaches an intersection.

events.description: exits covered sidewalk area into open intersection with visible crosswalk markings
crossing the wet asphalt road while vehicles wait at the traffic light

agents.ego_description: navigating across the intersection crosswalk with the group, avoiding other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: wide pedestrian crossing with red and yellow painted stripes on wet asphalt
tall pole with traffic lights and digital signage

segments.scene_description: The group steps into a wide open intersection, transitioning from the enclosed sidewalk to the expansive crosswalk. The wet asphalt reflects the overcast sky and surrounding neon lights. Pedestrians cross from multiple directions while a futuristic black car drives through the intersection. The traffic control pole and speed limit sign move closer as the group crosses toward the opposite corner.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with massive digital advertising pillars

events.description: entering covered walkway beneath building overpass with large digital pillars
ambient lighting shifts to dominant artificial neon as natural light is blocked by overhead structure

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered corridor beneath massive color-changing digital displays

entered.detail: enclosed walkway beneath a building overpass providing shelter from weather
tall cylindrical digital displays cycling through green, yellow, and red color patterns
wide stairs leading up to an elevated walkway or building entrance
row of yellow and white futuristic taxis parked along the street
purple automated vending machine with glowing interface

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters a sheltered pedestrian walkway beneath a massive building overpass. The environment shifts dramatically to artificial neon lighting dominated by towering vertical digital pillars that cycle through vibrant green, yellow, and red patterns. A concrete staircase rises on the right while parked taxis line the left. The group continues walking deeper into the covered corridor, passing vending machines and underpass structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked futuristic metropolis that transitions from an open city street into a sheltered, neon-lit corridor. It begins on a slick sidewalk flanked by towering skyscrapers and a curved digital building, following a group of pedestrians past holographic kiosks and parked cars. As the group reaches the edge of the sidewalk, the scene expands into a wide intersection where the wet asphalt reflects the overcast sky and vibrant neon lights while a black car drives through the crosswalk. The camera then moves toward the opposite corner, shifting from the open air into a sheltered pedestrian walkway beneath a massive building overpass. Finally, the environment transforms into a space dominated by artificial lighting and towering vertical digital pillars cycling through green, yellow, and red patterns as the group walks deeper into the covered corridor past vending machines and concrete stairs.
